description_long: This nightstand features a modern, rectangular design with a rich, medium-brown wooden frame and smooth, glossy surfaces on the top and shelf. The top surface is divided into three sections, with a central recessed area that may serve as a display or storage niche. The nightstand is supported by two wide, tapered wooden legs, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The open shelf beneath the top surface offers additional storage or display space, with no visible drawers or handles. The edges are smoothly rounded, giving the piece a sleek and polished appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, carvings, or hardware, emphasizing a minimalist and functional style.
description: A modern, rectangular nightstand with a glossy top, open shelf, and smooth, rounded wooden frame. It features two wide, tapered legs and a central recessed area for display or storage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular top with a central recessed area, open shelf, and two wide, tapered legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the wooden frame and the open shelf beneath the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same open shelf and leg design, with the central recessed area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the frame's thickness and the open shelf.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
